title: Shigley Example 15-4 style design of a worm gear set
notes: Upgraded schema supports candidate iteration for axial pitch and worm pitch diameter.
With axial_pitch_iteration_count = 1 and worm_pitch_diameter_iteration_count = 2, the run follows the textbook-style sequence p_x = 1.5 in, then d = 2.0 in and 2.5 in.
effective_face_width_selection_mode = 'auto_round_up' makes the solver choose the smallest rounded-up feasible face width for each candidate.
Use effective_face_width_selection_mode = 'input_override' only when you intentionally want to force a specific face width.
